requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling and Charge Documentation (NIS IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理及充注量文件（NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理及充注量文件（NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）

summary.en: Household refrigerators imported into Nigeria predominantly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3), a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant. Within the SONCAP/NIS framework the refrigerant is governed primarily through the safety standard: NIS IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA sets flammable-refrigerant requirements covering maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, ignition-source control, and marking. Manufacturers must: (1) verify the R-600a charge in the appliance complies with the Annex AA charge limits for its configuration; (2) declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation and on the rating plate; (3) provide handling and safety precautions for the flammable refrigerant. Nigeria is a party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment and operates an HFC phase-down through its National Ozone Office, which favours low-GWP refrigerants such as R-600a; however there is no Nigeria-specific F-Gas charge-certification regime equivalent to the EU for domestic appliances.
summary.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的家用电冰箱主要使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种低GWP碳氢化合物制冷剂。在SONCAP/NIS框架下，制冷剂主要通过安全标准管控：NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA规定可燃制冷剂要求，涵盖每种隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风、点火源控制及标识。制造商须：（1）核实器具中的R-600a充注量符合其配置下的附件AA充注量限值；（2）在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）提供可燃制冷剂的处理及安全注意事项。尼日利亚为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过其国家臭氧办公室执行HFC削减，倾向于R-600a等低GWP制冷剂；但尼日利亚就家用器具尚无与欧盟等效的氟气体充注量认证制度。
summary.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的家用電冰箱主要使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種低GWP碳氫化合物製冷劑。在SONCAP/NIS框架下，製冷劑主要通過安全標準管控：NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA規定可燃製冷劑要求，涵蓋每種隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風、點火源控制及標識。製造商須：（1）核實器具中的R-600a充注量符合其配置下的附件AA充注量限值；（2）在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）提供可燃製冷劑的處理及安全注意事項。奈及利亞為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過其國家臭氧辦公室執行HFC削減，傾向於R-600a等低GWP製冷劑；但奈及利亞就家用器具尚無與歐盟等效的氟氣體充注量認證制度。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition source control) — adopted by SON
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: higher flammability)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — Nigeria HFC phase-down administered by the National Ozone Office (Federal Ministry of Environment)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant requirements for household refrigerating appliances within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source control). Chinese refrigerator production has overwhelmingly transitioned to R-600a for domestic and export models. China operates its own HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE), separate from any Nigerian scheme. Because both Nigeria's NIS and China's GB derive from the same IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA text, the underlying refrigerant-safety requirements are closely aligned, so Chinese exporters of R-600a units are generally well-positioned on the refrigerant aspect.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014内规定家用制冷器具的可燃制冷剂要求，其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限值、通风、点火源控制）。中国冰箱生产已大量转向R-600a，涵盖内销及出口型号。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行自身的HFC削减计划，由生态环境部（MEE）管理，与尼日利亚任何制度相互独立。由于尼日利亚NIS与中国GB均源自相同的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA文本，底层制冷剂安全要求高度一致，故出口R-600a器具的中国制造商在制冷剂方面一般具备较好条件。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014內規定家用製冷器具的可燃製冷劑要求，其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限值、通風、點火源控制）。中國冰箱生產已大量轉向R-600a，涵蓋內銷及出口型號。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行自身的HFC削減計畫，由生態環境部（MEE）管理，與奈及利亞任何制度相互獨立。由於奈及利亞NIS與中國GB均源自相同的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA文本，底層製冷劑安全要求高度一致，故出口R-600a器具的中國製造商在製冷劑方面一般具備較好條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Flammable refrigerant (R-600a) provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is mainly documentation and charge verification rather than a technology change: (1) the SONCAP technical package and product documentation must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), the charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety precautions per NIS IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; (2) the actual R-600a charge must be confirmed against the Annex AA maximum limits for the appliance configuration — Chinese CCC test reports may not explicitly restate the charge against the same configuration assessed for Nigeria; (3) rating-plate and manual markings (in English) must carry the flammable-refrigerant warning symbols. Because both markets share the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis, no separate Nigerian F-Gas certification or refrigerant-handling licence is triggered for domestic R-600a appliances, but documentation completeness should be verified before each SONCAP submission.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距主要在于文件和充注量核实，而非技术变更：（1）SONCAP技术资料及产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷剂安全注意事项；（2）须针对器具配置确认实际R-600a充注量符合附件AA最大限值——中国CCC检测报告可能未针对尼日利亚所评估的相同配置明确重述充注量；（3）铭牌及说明书标识（英文）须载明可燃制冷剂警示符号。由于两个市场共享IEC 60335-2-24附件AA基础，家用R-600a器具不触发单独的尼日利亚氟气体认证或制冷剂处理许可，但每次SONCAP提交前应核实文件完整性。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距主要在於文件和充注量核實，而非技術變更：（1）SONCAP技術資料及產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃製冷劑安全注意事項；（2）須針對器具配置確認實際R-600a充注量符合附件AA最大限值——中國CCC檢測報告可能未針對奈及利亞所評估的相同配置明確重述充注量；（3）銘牌及說明書標識（英文）須載明可燃製冷劑警示符號。由於兩個市場共享IEC 60335-2-24附件AA基礎，家用R-600a器具不觸發單獨的奈及利亞氟氣體認證或製冷劑處理許可，但每次SONCAP提交前應核實文件完整性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via NIS IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a charge limits and marking) within SONCAP; Nigeria HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by the National Ozone Office
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant for both Chinese and Nigeria-bound household refrigerators and the NIS IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis is shared, so this is largely a documentation gap. Manufacturers must verify R-600a charge against Annex AA limits for the Nigeria configuration and clearly declare refrigerant type, charge weight in grams, and flammable-refrigerant markings in the SONCAP package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是中国及销往尼日利亚家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，且共享NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA基础，故主要为文件差距。制造商须针对尼日利亚配置核实R-600a充注量符合附件AA限值，并在SONCAP资料中清晰声明制冷剂类型、充注量（克）及可燃制冷剂标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是中國及銷往奈及利亞家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，且共享NIS IEC 60335-2-24附件AA基礎，故主要為文件差距。製造商須針對奈及利亞配置核實R-600a充注量符合附件AA限值，並在SONCAP資料中清晰聲明製冷劑類型、充注量（克）及可燃製冷劑標識。
